MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.
Martin Glickfeld, Esq., appeared on behalf of Plaintiff/respondent Robert Primus.
Defendant/moving party Alissa Thomas appeared on her own behalf.
Motion was argued, submitted, and taken under submission.

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROBERT PRIMUS' Motion For Injunctive And Or Other Equitable Relief is DENIED. The relief requested is not supported by authority or facts of this case. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of Reconveyance Of Notice Of Motion And Motin For Order Of Reconveyance Of Real Property From Defaulting Defendant And For Other Relief Under Ccp Section 373 And Welfare And Institutions Code Section 15657.03
Off Calendar Feb-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176.

Martin Glickfeld, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ROBERT PRIMUS, sworn and examined,
Defendant ALISSA THOMAS appearing on her own behalf,
Witness Tiffany Primus appearing for Plaintiff, sworn and examined.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Declaration of Robert Primus
2-Declaration of Tiffany Primus

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Pursuant to the First, Second and Third Causes of Action, the transfer of property located at 4636 Third Street in San Francisco, Parcel Block 5306, Lot 028, referred to in Plaintiff's complaint, is hereby cancelled and the "Warranty Deed" attached as Exhibit "A" to this Order is hereby invalidated and, further, the Court orders that Defendant Alissa Thomas has no rights, title or interest to and/or in said property.

Damages: $116,977.92
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $116,977.92

Counsel to submit Judgment for court signature.
